source_note: Verified against FTMO official comparison table (ftmo.oanda.com), launched Feb 2026. Target 10%, daily loss 3% (vs higher of equity/balance EOD), max loss 10% END-OF-DAY TRAILING, no minimum trading days, Best Day Rule = a single day max 50% of total profit (consistency 50%), unlimited time, not refundable. Engine approximates EOD trailing from end-of-day balances. Fee approximate (~EUR; 1-step may be slightly cheaper than 2-step) - verify exact 100K price at checkout.
